<!-- @generated by usage-cli from usage spec -->
# `x-gh-get-latest-version`

Get latest GitHub release version for a repository


- **Usage**: `x-gh-get-latest-version [FLAGS] <repo>`

## Arguments

### `<repo>`

GitHub repository (owner/repo)

## Flags

### `--branch`

Get latest branch name

### `--tag`

Get latest tag (default)

### `--commit`

Get latest commit SHA

### `--json`

Output as JSON

### `-v --verbose`

Verbose output

### `--oldest`

Get oldest instead of latest

### `--prereleases`

Include pre-releases
